title: Hot Wheels City Wreck & Ride Gorilla Attack with 1 Hot Wheels Car, Connects to Other Sets, Gas Station-Themed Set, Gift for Kids 4 to 8 Years Old, HDR30
features: The Hot Wheels City Wreck & Ride Gorilla Attack playset gives kids the thrills of being adventurous, driving cars and performing stunts to avoid being eaten by a giant gorilla!

Gary the gorilla has taken over the Hot Wheels City petrol station, and his arms that extend over a metre long are made from bendable track pieces that thrillseekers can race the included Hot Wheels vehicle along.
At one end of this Hot Wheels track set is a launcher that kids use to send their cars through the giant gorilla's mouth and try to avoid getting eaten whilst performing crazy stunts!

The bendable track pieces inside this playset have multiple connection points, so Hot Wheels fans can connect them to other Hot Wheels sets (each sold separately), creating even more awesome storytelling possibilities.
Makes a brilliant gift for kids aged 4+, who love Hot Wheels racing cars and high-octane action!
description: From the manufacturer Cars Since 1968, Hot Wheels has been challenging the limits, creating the coolest and craziest toy cars that appeal to kids and collectors alike. Playsets Hot Wheels tracks and playsets can connect to one another, inspiring racing and storytelling competitions and adventures! Track Set Kids hone their problem-solving skills designing and building innovative track set-ups that encourage creativity and challenge them to overcome obstacles. Hot Wheels: Challenge Accepted! With Hot Wheels cars, tracks and playsets, kids learn to play independently and create unlimited adventures.
